{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/reel-life/pulls/36","id":3487663846,"node_id":"PR_kwDORm_vg87P4Ybm","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn/reel-life/pull/36","diff_url":"https://github.com/patflynn/reel-life/pull/36.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/patflynn/reel-life/pull/36.patch","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/reel-life/issues/36","number":36,"state":"open","locked":false,"title":"feat: add Overseerr request detail, deletion, and retry","user":{"login":"patflynn","id":7862557,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjc4NjI1NTc=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/7862557?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"## Summary
- Add `GetRequest`, `DeleteRequest`, and `RetryRequest` to the Overseerr client with a new `delete()` HTTP helper
- Wire up three new agent tools: `get_request_detail`, `delete_request` (destructive), `retry_request` (destructive)
- Enrich the `Request` type with `UpdatedAt`, `Seasons`, and additional `MediaInfo` fields for the detail view
- Add httptest-based tests for all three new client methods

## Test plan
- [x] `go build ./...` passes
- [x] `go test ./...` passes (including new tests for GetRequest, DeleteRequest, RetryRequest)
- [x] `go vet ./...` clean

- [x] `go vet ./...` clean
